channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [INDOBELL] Indobell Insulations Secures $185,902 Export Order for Steam Turbine Insulation
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Indobell Insulations Ltd has announced that it has received a new export order worth 185,902 USD for Steam Turbine Insulation — Blanket Therm. The order was awarded by GE Vernova Operations LLC, based in Cambridge, USA. The payment terms are net 150 monthly, with the order to be executed within a broad time period. The order does not involve any related party transactions and there is no interest held by the promoter/promoter group/group companies in the awarding entity.

  • Indobell Insulations secures a new export order worth $185,902
  • Order awarded by GE Vernova Operations LLC, based in Cambridge, USA
  • Payment terms are net 150 monthly
  • Order is for Steam Turbine Insulation — Blanket Therm
  • No related party transactions involved

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Indobell Insulations Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [BLIL] Balmer Lawrie Investments Ltd. to Consider Interim Dividend Payment for FY 2025-26; Trading Window Closure Announced
item.description:
Balmer Lawrie Investments Ltd. has announced the closure of the trading window for designated persons, their immediate relatives, and insiders from 4th March 2026 to 17th March 2026. The decision comes in accordance with the company's 'Code of Conduct to Regulate, Monitor and Report Trading by Designated Persons and Immediate Relative of Designated Persons' as per the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The closure aims to ensure fair trading practices during the consideration of interim dividend payment for the Financial Year 2025-26, which is scheduled to be discussed in the Board of Directors meeting on 16th March 2026.

  • Balmer Lawrie Investments Ltd. to consider interim dividend payment for FY 2025-26
  • Trading window closure for designated persons, their immediate relatives, and insiders from 4th March 2026 to 17th March 2026
  • Closure in accordance with the company's Code of Conduct and SEBI regulations
  • Meeting of the Board of Directors scheduled on 16th March 2026
  • Aimed at ensuring fair trading practices during dividend consideration

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BALMER LAWRIE INVESTMENTS LTD. | Category: Dividend

item.title: [MOTILALOFS] Motilal Oswal Home Finance Secures $100 Million Debt Financing from Asian Development Bank for Affordable Women-Centric and Green Housing
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Motilal Oswal Home Finance Limited (MOHFL), a subsidiary of Motilal Oswal Financial Services Limited (MOFSL), has entered into an agreement with the Asian Development Bank (ADB) to raise USD 100 Million in INR equivalent in the form of debt through issuance of Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs). The proceeds will be used to finance affordable housing loans to women borrowers and support the adoption of environmentally sustainable construction practices. This financing reflects strong confidence from ADB in MOHFL’s business model, governance framework, and long-term growth prospects.

  • Motilal Oswal Home Finance Limited has secured USD 100 Million in debt financing from the Asian Development Bank.
  • The financing will be used to provide affordable housing loans to women borrowers and support green construction practices.
  • This investment reflects ADB's confidence in MOHFL’s business model, governance framework, and long-term growth prospects.
  • The funding will help MOHFL broaden access to affordable housing loans for women and support the Company’s entry into the green-certified housing segment.
  • MOHFL is an affordable housing finance company focused on serving first-time homebuyers in low and middle-income segments.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MOTILAL OSWAL FINANCIAL SERVICES LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [HYPERSOFT] Cyberpath Systems Pte. Ltd. Acquires 16.10% Stake in Hypersoft Technologies Ltd
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Cyberpath Systems Pte. Ltd. has acquired 1,36,00,000 shares, representing 16.10% of the total paid-up equity share capital of Hypersoft Technologies Limited. The acquisition was made pursuant to a fresh issue of equity shares on a preferential basis. The acquisition has resulted in the total diluted share capital of Hypersoft Technologies Limited to increase to Rs. 84,45,17,000 consisting of 8,44,51,700 equity shares of face value of Rs. 10/- each fully paid-up.

  • Cyberpath Systems Pte. Ltd. has acquired 16.10% stake in Hypersoft Technologies Ltd
  • The acquisition was made pursuant to a fresh issue of equity shares on a preferential basis
  • The total diluted share capital of Hypersoft Technologies Limited has increased to Rs. 84,45,17,000 consisting of 8,44,51,700 equity shares
  • The acquisition does not have any conversion or redemption feature attached to the equity shares
  • The equity shares have a face value of Rs. 10/- each and are fully paid-up

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Hypersoft Technologies Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [BLIL] Balmer Lawrie Investments Ltd. to Consider Interim Dividend Payment for FY 2025-26
item.description:
Balmer Lawrie Investments Ltd. has informed BSE that a Board of Directors meeting is scheduled on 16th March 2026 to consider the payment of an interim dividend for Financial Year 2025-26. The company's 'Code of Conduct to Regulate, Monitor and Report Trading by Designated Persons and Immediate Relative of Designated Persons' requires the closure of the 'Trading Window' for 'Designated Persons and their Immediate Relatives' and 'Insiders' from 4th March 2026 to 17th March 2026.

  • Balmer Lawrie Investments Ltd. to consider interim dividend payment for FY 2025-26
  • Trading Window to be closed for Designated Persons, their Immediate Relatives, and Insiders from 4th March to 17th March 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BALMER LAWRIE INVESTMENTS LTD. | Category: Dividend

item.title: [GROWINGTON] Manju Mundhra Acquires 10,00,000 Shares in Growington Ventures India Ltd
item.description:
Manju Mundhra, along with Naresh Kumar Mundhra, has acquired 10,00,000 shares in Growington Ventures India Ltd. This acquisition was made in accordance with Regulation 29(1) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The total equity share capital of the company stands at Rs 64,22,15,760/- before and after the acquisition.

  • Manju Mundhra and Naresh Kumar Mundhra have acquired 10,00,000 shares in Growington Ventures India Ltd.
  • The acquisition was made in accordance with Regulation 29(1) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
  • The total equity share capital of the company stands at Rs 64,22,15,760/- before and after the acquisition.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Growington Ventures India Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [HYPERSOFT] Quotrix Solutions Acquires 15.39% Stake in Hypersoft Technologies Through Fresh Issue of Equity Shares
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Quotrix Solutions Pte. Ltd. has acquired 1,30,00,000 shares, representing 15.39% of the total paid-up equity share capital of Hypersoft Technologies Limited. The acquisition was made through a fresh issue of equity shares on a preferential basis. The acquisition details, as per Regulation 29(1) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, are provided in the attached disclosure.

  • Quotrix Solutions Pte. Ltd. acquires 15.39% stake in Hypersoft Technologies Limited
  • Acquisition made through a fresh issue of equity shares on a preferential basis
  • Total paid-up equity share capital of Hypersoft Technologies Limited affected by the acquisition
  • Acquirer's holding details before and after the acquisition provided
  • No conversion or redemption feature attached to the equity shares

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Hypersoft Technologies Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [HYPERSOFT] Sudhakara Varma Yarramraju's Shareholding in Hypersoft Technologies Diluted to 1.16%
item.description:
Sudhakara Varma Yarramraju, holding 9,81,155 equity shares of Hypersoft Technologies Ltd, has seen his shareholding diluted from 6.04% to 1.16% due to a fresh issue of equity shares on a preferential basis to other allottees. The acquisition/sale details and the company's share capital details are provided in the disclosure.

  • Sudhakara Varma Yarramraju's shareholding diluted to 1.16% from 6.04%
  • 9,81,155 equity shares held by Yarramraju
  • Fresh issue of equity shares on a preferential basis to other allottees
  • Hypersoft Technologies Limited's share capital increased to Rs. 84,45,17,000/- from Rs. 16,25,17,000/-
  • No acquisition or sale of shares by the acquirer

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Hypersoft Technologies Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [ONGC] Oil and Natural Gas Corporation Ltd Clarifies on Volume Movement, No Pending Announcements
item.description:
In response to an email from the BSE, Oil and Natural Gas Corporation Ltd has clarified that they have made all necessary disclosures as per Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. There are no pending announcements that would have a bearing on the volume behavior of the shares. The company notes that the recent movement in share volume is market-driven, a result of market forces, and likely influenced by the upheaval in oil and gas prices due to geo-political tensions in the last 5-6 months.

  • Oil and Natural Gas Corporation Ltd has made all necessary disclosures as per Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
  • No pending announcements that would affect share volume behavior
  • Share volume movement is market-driven and influenced by recent oil and gas price upheaval due to geo-political tensions

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Oil and Natural Gas Corporation Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [NEOINFRA] Bhavik N. Mehta Acquires Shares in Neo Infracon Ltd, Increasing Stake to 5.95%
item.description:
According to a disclosure made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, Mr. Bhavik N. Mehta has acquired shares in Neo Infracon Ltd. The acquisition took place on 2nd March 2026, through the open market. Before the acquisition, Mr. Mehta held 5.93% shares of the company, which increased to 5.95% after the acquisition. The total equity share capital of the company remains at 53,06,800 equity shares before and after the acquisition.

  • Bhavik N. Mehta acquires shares in Neo Infracon Ltd
  • Acquisition through open market
  • Share holding increased from 5.93% to 5.95%
  • Acquisition date: 2nd March 2026
  • Total equity share capital remains at 53,06,800 equity shares

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NEO INFRACON LTD. | Category: Acquisitions
